title: MIXED WORKMAN, Assistant garden worker
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
meta_description: T:mi Antti Keskitalo, Pöytyä is seeking a MIXED WORKMAN, Assistant garden worker in Pöytyä. We are seeking a versatile Assistant Garden Worker for our company
description: We are seeking a versatile Assistant Garden Worker for our company located in Pöytyä, Finland. This role involves preparing the planting area, assisting with cultivation of special crops, and performing various tasks related to plant establishment, including planting work, machine operations, packaging, small-scale repairs, construction work, and delivery duties. The ideal candidate should possess good physical condition, a driver's license (a plus), and proficiency in both Finnish and English. Accommodation is provided if needed, and the central farm produces seedlings for fruit trees and berry plants as well as organic berries. Interested parties can apply by visiting our website at www.keskitalontila.fi or contacting us via WhatsApp at +358405092326.
what_we_offer: MIXED WORKMAN, Assistant garden worker We are looking for an employee for our company for varied tasks.
The tasks are mainly related to the cultivation of special crops.
search_keywords: mixed workman, assistant garden worker, cultivation of special crops, establishment of plantations, planting work, machine work, packaging work, small-scale repair and construction work, sending deliveries, driver's license, Finnish or English language skills, accommodation

title: A kitchen worker in a lunch restaurant

description: Vimpro Oy is seeking a kitchen worker at their lunch restaurant in Tuusula, Finland. This position offers permanent employment with day work starting at 8:30 a.m., providing a welcoming community where employees feel comfortable and accepted for who they are. The role involves preparing and presenting the lunch service, managing customer interactions on the hall side, ensuring smooth operations during busy times, and maintaining a clean, hygienic environment. Applicants should have good attitude, strong work experience in the field, and be able to handle tasks efficiently under pressure while keeping a positive outlook. Vimpro Oy offers a permanent position, day work (weekdays at 8:30 a.m.), a friendly workplace that feels like home, and welcomes people of all ages.

You have a strong attitude and can keep things together even in a hurry
Sense of humor (we can and should laugh)

Customer service on the hall side
Ensuring general smoothness in the rush of everyday life
